title: PlanStepCompletedPayload (v1)
description: Payload of a `plan_step_completed` event — step reached terminal success. See spec/plan-lifecycle-v1.md §5.3.

ordinal.description: Zero-based position of the step within its plan.

tool_calls_made.description: Number of tool calls the step performed.

task_id.description: Delegation task id; present iff this step was delegated (§3.7).

goal_id.description: Owning goal when the plan serves a goal.
